narrative: An AI Engineer with six years at Mad Street Den, a product‑focused startup, brings solid hands‑on experience in TensorFlow, Weaviate and Elasticsearch. Their background aligns well with the search and retrieval focus of the role, especially the Elasticsearch expertise for building scalable indexing pipelines and the Weaviate experience for vector‑based retrieval. The primary factor in the ranking is that their overall JD‑relevant skill match falls below the pool average, pulling them down despite a good experience level. While the candidate’s experience meets the 5‑9 year target, being based in Jaipur rather than Pune/Noida may affect immediate on‑site collaboration.
